_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox look to take series vs Orioles in Thursday matinee
items.snark: One win and suddenly the Sox think they can sweep, like a guy getting one match on Tinder and planning the wedding.

items.headline: Red Sox finally earn double-digit Fenway victory
items.snark: Took until June to get 10 home wins and they're throwing a parade, embarrassing for everyone involved.

items.headline: Payton Tolle brings the heat on the mound and an infectious joy off it
items.snark: Tolle's out here having fun while the offense hits like they're swinging pool noodles, someone protect this man.

items.headline: Garrett Crochet diagnosed with low-grade lat strain
items.snark: Crochet gets hurt coming back from being hurt, this pitching staff is held together with duct tape and prayers.
